primary_instruction_file.evidence: AGENTS.md present, well-structured (setup/build-test-lint/structure/style/security sections); content is templated placeholders pending stack.
primary_instruction_file.why: AGENTS.md is the cross-vendor instruction standard agents read first.
primary_instruction_file.consequence: Agents start cold and re-derive project knowledge each session.

instruction_quality.evidence: Sections are project-shaped but build/test/lint are TODO-by-stack placeholders, not real commands (generic stack).
instruction_quality.why: Value comes from project-specific facts: exact commands, real paths, conventions.
instruction_quality.consequence: Placeholder commands force trial-and-error and slow every task.

instruction_conciseness.evidence: instruction_audit.py: 63 lines, ~583 tokens, 0 boilerplate phrases, well under the 300-line limit.
instruction_conciseness.why: Focused instruction files keep the model on-signal.

hierarchical_instructions.evidence: Single root AGENTS.md; no subpackages exist yet (no code), so a single file is adequate at current scale.
hierarchical_instructions.why: Scoped per-package files deliver locally-relevant context in large repos.
hierarchical_instructions.consequence: Once packages appear, a single root file omits local conventions or bloats.

cross_agent_bridge.evidence: CLAUDE.md is a symlink -> AGENTS.md; single source of truth, no contradictory copies.
cross_agent_bridge.why: Bridged vendor files keep all tools on identical guidance from one source.

repo_map_availability.evidence: repo_map.py analyzed 0 source files (no code yet); a map is cleanly generatable once code lands.
repo_map_availability.why: Repo maps are the highest-evidence navigation lever (~70% token reduction).
repo_map_availability.consequence: Without a map agents fall back to broad reads and grep.

semantic_nav_amenability.evidence: No typed-language config (no tsconfig/pyrightconfig/mypy) and no source to analyze yet.
semantic_nav_amenability.why: LSP semantic nav requires typed/analyzable code and a language server.
semantic_nav_amenability.consequence: Untyped code forces fuzzy text search; refactors miss call sites.
semantic_nav_amenability.fix_ref: Add static types + language server once the stack is chosen.

dependency_structure_clarity.evidence: No build manifest or dependency declaration yet (generic/undecided stack).
dependency_structure_clarity.why: A derivable dependency graph lets agents reason about blast radius.
dependency_structure_clarity.fix_ref: Add a manifest and clear module boundaries as the project grows.

readme_overview.evidence: No README.md; AGENTS.md carries an overview placeholder but no dedicated README.
readme_overview.why: A root README is the cheapest high-level map of intent and entry points.
readme_overview.consequence: Agents misinterpret purpose and entry points.

machine_readable_contracts.evidence: No OpenAPI/Protobuf/GraphQL schemas; not yet applicable (no boundaries defined).
machine_readable_contracts.why: Machine-readable contracts give unambiguous interface specs at boundaries.
machine_readable_contracts.consequence: Agents infer request/response shapes and get them subtly wrong.
machine_readable_contracts.fix_ref: Author schemas at boundaries when they exist.

file_size_sanity.evidence: file_metrics.py: 0 oversized files; 7 source/doc files, 274 LOC total.
file_size_sanity.why: Shorter files are understood better by LLMs.

test_suite_present.evidence: No test files found (greenfield, no code).
test_suite_present.why: Test feedback is the single highest-impact comprehension signal for agents.
test_suite_present.consequence: Agents have no objective signal a change works.
test_suite_present.fix_ref: Write a real test suite as code lands.

test_commands_documented.evidence: test_commands.py: no real command; AGENTS.md has TODO-by-stack placeholders only.
test_commands_documented.why: Tests only help if the agent can find and run them.
test_commands_documented.consequence: Agents skip verification or invent wrong invocations.

fast_feedback_loop.why: A fast subset enables seconds-not-minutes iteration.

feedback_quality.evidence: No type-checker config and no tests (coverage_signals.py: 0 files).
feedback_quality.why: Descriptive assertions + a type-checker turn failures into actionable signals.

ci_runs_tests_lint.evidence: .github/workflows/ci.yml present with install/lint/test jobs, but steps are echo placeholders (TODO-by-stack).
ci_runs_tests_lint.why: CI is the automated trusted feedback gate.

lint_format_automated.evidence: No stack linter/formatter config (ruff/eslint/prettier); only generic pre-commit hooks present.

pre_commit_hooks.evidence: .pre-commit-config.yaml present: trailing-whitespace, end-of-file-fixer, check-yaml, check-added-large-files, detect-secrets; stack hooks are TODO.
pre_commit_hooks.why: Pre-commit hooks shift checks left to commit time.

governance.why: CODEOWNERS + dependency automation keep an agent-active repo healthy.

standard_skills.evidence: No SKILL.md in the project (only host .claude/settings.local.json).
standard_skills.why: Agent Skills package reusable, portable capabilities.
standard_skills.consequence: Workflows live in ad-hoc prompts that don't transfer.

bundled_helper_scripts.evidence: No skills, hence no bundled scripts/ dir.
bundled_helper_scripts.why: Bundled scripts keep deterministic logic out of the context window.
bundled_helper_scripts.consequence: Deterministic ops re-derived as model reasoning.

mcp_declaration.evidence: No .mcp.json or vendor MCP config committed.
mcp_declaration.why: A committed MCP config declares expected tools reproducibly.
mcp_declaration.consequence: Each user wires servers manually and inconsistently.

nav_comprehension_mcp_servers.why: Nav/comprehension MCP servers give exact symbol/reference capability.
nav_comprehension_mcp_servers.consequence: Agents rely on fuzzy text search.

custom_commands.why: Vendor commands capture repeatable per-agent workflows (legacy-positive).
custom_commands.consequence: Recurring workflows retyped; weakest tooling signal.

committed_isolation_config.evidence: No .devcontainer/ or other committed isolation config.
committed_isolation_config.why: True isolation is the only reliable boundary for autonomous execution.
committed_isolation_config.consequence: Compromised code can exfiltrate secrets / reach network.

documented_execution_policy.evidence: docs/agent-execution.md present: vendor-neutral sandbox options (LINCE/devcontainer/OS-sandbox/hosted) + safe-to-run command list; AGENTS.md links it.
documented_execution_policy.why: A documented policy is how non-detectable sandboxes earn credit.

agent_permission_policy.evidence: .claude/settings.local.json exists (host-generated) but is not a deliberate restrictive deny policy.
agent_permission_policy.why: A restrictive permission policy constrains unprompted agent actions.
agent_permission_policy.consequence: Permissive/absent policy lets agents run arbitrary commands.
agent_permission_policy.fix_ref: Author restrictive deny rules per threat model.

secret_hygiene.evidence: secret_hygiene.py: .gitignore 100% secret coverage, .env.example present with no real values, 0 committed secrets; detect-secrets in pre-commit. Missing CI secret scanning + push protection.
secret_hygiene.why: AI-assisted commits leak secrets at ~2x baseline.
secret_hygiene.consequence: A leaked credential is immediately exploitable.

supply_chain_pinning.evidence: lockfile_check.py: no lockfiles (no deps yet), no Dependabot/Renovate.
supply_chain_pinning.why: Committed lockfiles pin the dependency surface.

injection_hygiene.evidence: Instructions live only in trusted AGENTS.md + bridge; no instruction-like content in other agent-read docs.
injection_hygiene.why: Instructions must live only in trusted files.

spec_tasks_dir.evidence: specs/ exists with TEMPLATE.md; no real specs yet.
spec_tasks_dir.why: A specs dir gives agents an authoritative statement of what to build.
spec_tasks_dir.consequence: Agents infer intent and drift from requirements.

acceptance_criteria.evidence: specs/TEMPLATE.md includes an acceptance-criteria checklist section.
acceptance_criteria.why: Acceptance criteria give a verifiable definition of done.
acceptance_criteria.consequence: 'Done' is subjective; agents stop early or gold-plate.

issue_pr_templates.why: Templates standardize the context provided with each unit of work.

adr_decisions.why: ADRs preserve the why behind design choices.

docs_comprehension_signals.evidence: docs/ present (agent-execution) but no ARCHITECTURE doc or CHANGELOG; no code to annotate yet (coverage_signals.py: 0 files).
docs_comprehension_signals.why: Architecture doc + type/docstring coverage aid comprehension.
docs_comprehension_signals.consequence: Agents reverse-engineer structure from raw code.

instruction_audit.note: AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md duplication pair is the intended symlink bridge, not drift

top_improvements.description: No tests yet — add a suite + document run commands as code lands (high impact, expected-empty for greenfield).
Add a committed .mcp.json and wire Serena once code exists; consider project Skills.
Add a README and pick a typed stack to unlock repo-map + semantic nav.
Replace CI placeholders with real test/lint commands; add CODEOWNERS + Dependabot.
Add issue/PR templates and an ADR dir; write real specs from the template.
